extraction.one_line_summary: DEMAR Arnaud won sprint from perfect UAE leadout, taking fourth stage win after Israel Startup Nation positioning got bulldozed by Groupama-FDJ
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates established leadout but Groupama-FDJ physically bullied them aside in final kilometers, revealing sprint train vulnerability to aggression.
Viviani's motorbike crash 35km out derailed preparation even after rejoining, showing late-race positioning disruptions destroy sprint performance.
Israel Startup Nation attempted sprint train assist for UAE but lacked strength to hold position through technical finale.

rider_signals.DEMAR Arnaud: positive: fourth stage win shows complete sprint dominance at this Giro, unprecedented French success since Bernadino era
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: motorbike incident 35km out requiring medical attention led to only 10th place, timing of disruption proved insurmountable
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: seventh place despite no obvious incident suggests losing speed battle to Demar decisively
rider_signals.ARMY Sander: neutral: solo breakaway fight to 6km shows contract-year desperation can produce extended resistance against peloton chase
